concerns.text: Tasks T026-T027 validate core invariants (crossing number, braid index) against KnotInfo, but FR-003 and SC-008 explicitly state core invariants are TABULATED from Knot Atlas (not computed) and algorithm validation applies only to additional invariants in Phase 2+. These tasks implement the wrong validation scope.

Task T049 generates 'logs.md' documentation file but FR-007 requires actual timestamped log files capturing operation/input/output/parameters/status/duration_ms for reproducibility, not just documentation about logs. Coverage gap: no task creates actual log files.

Tasks T065-T066 are duplicated in Phase 2 (Foundational) and Phase N (Polish) with conflicting descriptions. Phase 2 T065 is 'citation validation framework' but Phase N T065 is 'error margin analysis'. Phase 2 T066 is 'content hashing' but Phase N T066 is 'signal-to-noise ratio analysis'. Ambiguous which tasks to implement.

Task T041 (source independence assessment) is placed in Phase 5 (regression analysis) but FR-013 requires this documentation in reproducibility artifacts (docs/reproducibility/hyperbolic_volume_validation.md), not regression-specific outputs. Task should be in Phase 6 (US4) with other reproducibility documentation.

Tasks T062-T066 address reviewer concerns (dan-rockmore, marie-curie-simulated) but are not explicitly mandated in spec.md requirements. These introduce potential scope creep beyond authorized deliverables. Either remove or add explicit spec references.
